Connects to an EventHub and apply an avro file to a schema registry

Usage: Apply -t <AADTenantId> -c <ClientId> -s <ClientSecretKey> -e <EventHub> -g <SchemaGroup> -f <File>

Options:

  -t | --AADTenantId      <TEXT>  []
  Azure Active Directory Tenant Id

  -c | --ClientId         <TEXT>  []
  Your SPN Client Id

  -s | --ClientSecretKey  <TEXT>  []
  Your SPN Client Secret Key

  -e | --EventHub         <TEXT>  []
  EventHub name

  -g | --SchemaGroup      <TEXT>  []
  Schema group

  -f | --File             <TEXT>  []
  The avro file to apply
